note: diffusers FluxPipeline requires HuggingFace auth to fetch config from black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev (gated repo), even when using the publicly available Comfy-Org/flux1-dev FP8 checkpoint. Benchmark skipped — user not logged in to HuggingFace.
workaround: Run: huggingface-cli login, accept FLUX.1-dev license at https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev, then re-run benchmark.
